category_sources: source_facts.description says helmfile deploys Kubernetes Helm Charts.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name gives the project/formula name as helmfile.
docs_sources: Official documentation is hosted at https://helmfile.readthedocs.io/en/stable/; source_facts.homepage points to the official helmfile GitHub project.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/helmfile/helmfile, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states deployment of Kubernetes Helm charts.
